history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows several people, including a woman centered in the foreground, with overlaid text in large white and yellow letters.

The main subject is a woman shown from the shoulders up, facing slightly to the left, with her mouth open as if speaking or shouting. She wears a light-colored head covering or scarf that frames her face, and her head is turned toward the left side of the image. Behind her, two men are visible: one on the left wearing a dark cap with a light-colored emblem and a dark face covering, and one on the right wearing a dark cap. The background is a plain light-colored indoor or outdoor surface, with the figures occupying most of the frame.

The lighting is flat and bright, with the faces clearly illuminated. The composition is tightly cropped around the group, and the text overlay is layered across the bottom half of the image in multiple lines. The text includes a yellow name-like word at the top left area and larger white phrases below, with some words separated by line breaks.

Visible Text:
BARUDAK
JOESTARTIDUR udh malam
besok
LANJUT KEME SIR
CARI DI0

Practical Summary:
The image shows a group of people close together, centered on a woman speaking with others partially visible behind her. Large overlay text covers much of the lower portion of the picture.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
